mapper.insert: insert into DP_OPERATE_LOG (ID, LOGNAME, LOGTIME, DATACOUNT) values (#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{logName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{logTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{dataCount,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: select max(LOGTIME) as time from DP_OPERATE_LOG where LOGNAME = #{logname}

select l.ID as id, l.LOGNAME as logName, l.LOGTIME as logTime, l.DATACOUNT as dataCount from DP_OPERATE_LOG l where l.LOGNAME = #{logname} and l.LOGTIME = (select max(LOGTIME) from DP_OPERATE_LOG where LOGNAME = #{logname})

select l.ID as id, l.LOGNAME as logName, l.LOGTIME as logTime, l.DATACOUNT as dataCount from DP_OPERATE_LOG l where l.LOGNAME = #{logname} and l.LOGTIME = (select min(LOGTIME) from DP_OPERATE_LOG where LOGNAME = #{logname})
